Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWBIOMETRIA', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &PesCod = &Context.PesCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'BIOALOUNIPRONOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'BIOALOUNIPRONOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'BIOALOUNIPRONOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Biometria' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &SdtBiometria.Clear() EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'WWBiometriaColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'WWBiometriaColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf BioFilCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible BioAloUniProNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible BioAloLotNro.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible BioAloLotCic.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible BioDta.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible BioQtdAmo.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible BioTotPeso.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible BioIdade.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible BioImg.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible BioAloLin.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Do 'loadSelecionados' &numeric = &SdtBiometria.Count DuplicatasSelect.Caption = trim(str(&numeric)) + ' - Biometrias Selec.' EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) &ActionSelecione.TooltipText = "" &Update = !'' &Update.Link = Biometria.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, BioCod) &Delete = !'' &Delete.Link = Biometria.Link(TrnMode.Delete, EmpCod, BioCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &AuxBioCod = BioCod &IsMarcado = False Do 'IsSelecionado' if &IsMarcado = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) Endif EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'WWBiometriaColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Biometria.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(BioCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAlojamento' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWAlojamento.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMortalidade' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWMortalidade.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoArracoamento' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWArracoamento.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcarDesmarcar' do 'MarcaDesmarca' do 'GravaSelecionadas' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoReplicarBiometria' If &SdtBiometria.Count > 0 &WebSession.Set('BIOMETRIAREPLICAR',&SdtBiometria.ToXml()) WPReplicaBiometria.Call() Else msg('ATENÇÃO! Nenhuma Biometria selecionada como base de replicação, favor selecionar ao menos uma.') EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"BioFilCod", '', !'Filial', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"BioAloUniProNom", '', !'Tanque', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"BioAloLotNro", '', !'Lote', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"BioAloLotCic", '', !'Ciclo', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"BioDta", '', !'Data', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"BioQtdAmo", '', !'Amostras', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"BioTotPeso", '', !'Peso Total', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"BioIdade", '', !'Idade', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"BioImg", '', !'Imagem', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"BioAloLin", '', !'Linha', False, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'WWBiometriaColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &BioAloUniProNom1.Visible = False &BioAloLotNro1.Visible = False &BioAloLotCic1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersBioDta1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'BIOALOUNIPRONOM' &BioAloUniProNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'BIOALOLOTNRO' &BioAloLotNro1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'BIOALOLOTCIC' &BioAloLotCic1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'BIODTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersBioDta1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &BioAloUniProNom2.Visible = False &BioAloLotNro2.Visible = False &BioAloLotCic2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersBioDta2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'BIOALOUNIPRONOM' &BioAloUniProNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'BIOALOLOTNRO' &BioAloLotNro2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'BIOALOLOTCIC' &BioAloLotCic2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'BIODTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersBioDta2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &BioAloUniProNom3.Visible = False &BioAloLotNro3.Visible = False &BioAloLotCic3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersBioDta3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'BIOALOUNIPRONOM' &BioAloUniProNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'BIOALOLOTNRO' &BioAloLotNro3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'BIOALOLOTCIC' &BioAloLotCic3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'BIODTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersBioDta3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'BIOALOUNIPRONOM' &BioAloUniProNom2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'BIOALOUNIPRONOM' &BioAloUniProNom3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"BIOFILCOD" &BioFilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'BIOALOUNIPRONOM' &BioAloUniProNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'BIOALOLOTNRO' &BioAloLotNro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'BIOALOLOTCIC' &BioAloLotCic1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'BIODTA' &BioDta1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &BioDta_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"BIOFILCOD", "", not &BioFilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &BioFilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'BIOALOUNIPRONOM' AND not &BioAloUniProNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &BioAloUniProNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'BIOALOLOTNRO' AND not &BioAloLotNro1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &BioAloLotNro1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'BIOALOLOTCIC' AND not &BioAloLotCic1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &BioAloLotCic1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'BIODTA' AND not (&BioDta1.IsEmpty() AND &BioDta_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &BioDta1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &BioDta_To1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'BIOALOUNIPRONOM' AND not &BioAloUniProNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &BioAloUniProNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'BIOALOLOTNRO' AND not &BioAloLotNro2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &BioAloLotNro2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'BIOALOLOTCIC' AND not &BioAloLotCic2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &BioAloLotCic2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'BIODTA' AND not (&BioDta2.IsEmpty() AND &BioDta_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &BioDta2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &BioDta_To2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'BIOALOUNIPRONOM' AND not &BioAloUniProNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &BioAloUniProNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'BIOALOLOTNRO' AND not &BioAloLotNro3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &BioAloLotNro3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'BIOALOLOTCIC' AND not &BioAloLotCic3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &BioAloLotCic3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'BIODTA' AND not (&BioDta3.IsEmpty() AND &BioDta_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &BioDta3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &BioDta_To3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Biometria" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &ActionSelecione.Click if &IsMarcado = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) &IsMarcado = false Else &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &IsMarcado = true Endif If &IsMarcado = true &BioDta = BioDta &BioAloLin = BioAloLin &BioAloLotCod = BioAloLotCod &BioCod = BioCod Do 'Validasdt' If &Ispodeadicionar = true &SdtBiometriaItem = new() &SdtBiometriaItem.BioCod = BioCod &SdtBiometriaItem.BioDta = BioDta &SdtBiometriaItem.BioObs = BioObs &SdtBiometriaItem.BioPesMed = BioPesMed_Formula &SdtBiometriaItem.BioPesTot = BioTotPeso &SdtBiometriaItem.BioQtdAmo = BioQtdAmo &SdtBiometriaItem.BioImg = BioImg &SdtBiometriaItem.BioAloCod = BioAloCod &SdtBiometriaItem.BioAloLin = BioAloLin &SdtBiometriaItem.BioAloLotCod = BioAloLotCod &SdtBiometriaItem.BioAloUniProCod = BioAloUniProCod &SdtBiometria.Add(&SdtBiometriaItem) Else Msg('Não é possível adicionar') EndIf Else For &SdtBiometriaItem in &SdtBiometria If &SdtBiometriaItem.BioCod = BioCod &Index = &SdtBiometria.IndexOf(&SdtBiometriaItem) &SdtBiometria.Remove(&Index) Exit EndIF EndFor EndIf do 'GravaSelecionadas' &numeric = &SdtBiometria.Count DuplicatasSelect.Caption = trim(str(&numeric)) + ' - Biometrias Selec.' EndEvent Event limpar_campo.Click &SdtBiometria.Clear() do 'GravaSelecionadas' EndEvent Sub 'MarcaDesmarca' For each Line if &IsMarcado = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) &IsMarcado = false Else &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &IsMarcado = true Endif If &IsMarcado = true &BioDta = BioDta &BioAloLin = BioAloLin &BioAloLotCod = BioAloLotCod &BioCod = BioCod Do 'Validasdt' If &Ispodeadicionar = true &SdtBiometriaItem = new() &SdtBiometriaItem.BioCod = BioCod &SdtBiometriaItem.BioDta = BioDta &SdtBiometriaItem.BioObs = BioObs &SdtBiometriaItem.BioFilCod = BioFilCod &SdtBiometriaItem.BioPesMed = BioPesMed_Formula &SdtBiometriaItem.BioPesTot = BioTotPeso &SdtBiometriaItem.BioQtdAmo = BioQtdAmo &SdtBiometriaItem.BioImg = BioImg &SdtBiometriaItem.BioAloCod = BioAloCod &SdtBiometriaItem.BioAloLin = BioAloLin &SdtBiometriaItem.BioAloLotCod = BioAloLotCod &SdtBiometriaItem.BioAloUniProCod = BioAloUniProCod &SdtBiometria.Add(&SdtBiometriaItem) Else Msg('Não é possível adicionar') EndIf Else For &SdtBiometriaItem in &SdtBiometria If &SdtBiometriaItem.BioCod = BioCod &Index = &SdtBiometria.IndexOf(&SdtBiometriaItem) &SdtBiometria.Remove(&Index) Exit EndIF EndFor EndIf EndFor do 'GravaSelecionadas' Refresh EndSub Sub 'IsSelecionado' For &SdtBiometriaItem in &SdtBiometria If &SdtBiometriaItem.BioCod = &AuxBioCod &IsMarcado = true exit EndIf EndFor EndSub Sub 'Validasdt' &iserro = false &Ispodeadicionar = false If &SdtBiometria.Count > 0 For &SdtBiometriaItem in &SdtBiometria If &SdtBiometriaItem.BioDta = &BioDta and &SdtBiometriaItem.BioAloLotCod = &BioAloLotCod &Ispodeadicionar = true Else &iserro = True Endif EndFor Else &iserro = false &Ispodeadicionar = True EndIf If &iserro = True msg('Não foi Possível adicionar a biometria de código '+str(&BioCod)+ '. Pois Data ou lote são diferentes. Verifique') EndIf EndSub Sub 'GravaSelecionadas' padraoUsuario.Call('G', 'SEL_WWBiometria', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &SdtBiometria.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod) EndSub Sub 'loadSelecionados' padraoUsuario.Call('L', 'SEL_WWBiometria', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &SdtBiometria.FromJson(&PadObs) EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
